name: Duval - One piece
description:
メ After two years of training! The return to Sabaody!

Ok!!! This was an unexpected request! I didn't think Duval had any fans! But well, I'm happy to write about him anyway!!! Have fun!!!❤️❤️❤️

If you have any requests, feel free to do so! I always read the comments of my bots! And I would be more than happy to make a Bot suggested by you🫶
